mapper.select:
SELECT r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_id AS targetId,
CASE r.target_type WHEN 'FEED' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 80) FROM feed_post WHERE post_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FEED_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 80) FROM post_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FREEBOARD' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(title, 1, 80) FROM freeboard WHERE board_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FREEBOARD_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 80) FROM freeboard_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'MATE' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(title, 1, 80) FROM travel_mate WHERE mate_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'MATE_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 80) FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) END AS targetContent,
CASE r.target_type WHEN 'FEED' THEN (SELECT status FROM feed_post WHERE post_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FEED_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT status FROM post_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FREEBOARD' THEN (SELECT status FROM freeboard WHERE board_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FREEBOARD_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT status FROM freeboard_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'MATE' THEN (SELECT post_status FROM travel_mate WHERE mate_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'MATE_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT status FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) END AS contentStatus, r.reported_id AS reportedMemberId, om2.nickname AS reportedNickname, COUNT(r.report_id) AS totalReportCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report ru WHERE ru.reported_id = r.reported_id AND ru.created_at > NVL( (SELECT MAX(ms.reg_date) FROM memberStatus ms WHERE ms.member_id = r.reported_id AND ms.status_code = 1), DATE '1900-01-01' )) AS userReportCount,
TO_CHAR(MAX(r.created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS latestReportAt
FROM report r LEFT JOIN member2 om2 ON om2.member_id = r.reported_id
WHERE 1=1
AND r.target_type = #{targetType}
GROUP BY r.target_type, r.target_id, r.reported_id, om2.nickname ORDER BY MAX(r.created_at) DESC

SELECT r.report_id AS reportId, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, m2.nickname AS reporterNickname, r.target_type AS targetType, r.target_id AS targetId, CASE r.target_type WHEN 'FEED' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 60) FROM feed_post WHERE post_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FEED_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 60) FROM post_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FREEBOARD' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(title, 1, 60) FROM freeboard WHERE board_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'FREEBOARD_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 60) FROM freeboard_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'MATE' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(title, 1, 60) FROM travel_mate WHERE mate_id = r.target_id) WHEN 'MATE_COMMENT' THEN (SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(content), 1, 60) FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = r.target_id) END AS targetContent, r.reason, r.status, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, r.reported_id AS reportedMemberId, om2.nickname AS reportedNickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report rc WHERE rc.target_type = r.target_type AND rc.target_id = r.target_id) AS totalReportCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report ru WHERE ru.reported_id = r.reported_id AND ru.created_at > NVL( (SELECT MAX(ms.reg_date) FROM memberStatus ms WHERE ms.member_id = r.reported_id AND ms.status_code = 1), DATE '1900-01-01')) AS userReportCount FROM report r JOIN member1 m1 ON m1.member_id = r.reporter_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = m1.member_id LEFT JOIN member2 om2 ON om2.member_id = r.reported_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report r WHERE r.target_id IN ( SELECT post_id FROM feed_post WHERE member_id = #{reportedMemberId} UNION ALL SELECT comment_id FROM post_comment WHERE member_id = #{reportedMemberId} UNION ALL SELECT board_id FROM freeboard WHERE member_id = #{reportedMemberId} UNION ALL SELECT comment_id FROM freeboard_comment WHERE member_id = #{reportedMemberId} UNION ALL SELECT mate_id FROM travel_mate WHERE member_id = #{reportedMemberId} UNION ALL SELECT comment_id FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE member_id = #{reportedMemberId} ) AND r.created_at > NVL( (SELECT MAX(ms.reg_date) FROM memberStatus ms WHERE ms.member_id = #{reportedMemberId} AND ms.status_code = 1), DATE '1900-01-01' )

SELECT owner_id FROM ( SELECT member_id AS owner_id FROM feed_post WHERE post_id = #{targetId} AND #{targetType} = 'FEED' UNION ALL SELECT member_id FROM post_comment WHERE comment_id = #{targetId} AND #{targetType} = 'FEED_COMMENT' UNION ALL SELECT member_id FROM freeboard WHERE board_id = #{targetId} AND #{targetType} = 'FREEBOARD' UNION ALL SELECT member_id FROM freeboard_comment WHERE comment_id = #{targetId} AND #{targetType} = 'FREEBOARD_COMMENT' UNION ALL SELECT member_id FROM travel_mate WHERE mate_id = #{targetId} AND #{targetType} = 'MATE' UNION ALL SELECT member_id FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = #{targetId} AND #{targetType} = 'MATE_COMMENT' ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE feed_post SET status = 0 WHERE post_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE post_comment SET status = 0 WHERE comment_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE freeboard SET status = 0 WHERE board_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE freeboard_comment SET status = 0 WHERE comment_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE travel_mate SET post_status = 0 WHERE mate_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE travel_mate_comment SET status = 0 WHERE comment_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE feed_post SET status = 1 WHERE post_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE post_comment SET status = 1 WHERE comment_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE freeboard SET status = 1 WHERE board_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE freeboard_comment SET status = 1 WHERE comment_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE travel_mate SET post_status = 1 WHERE mate_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE travel_mate_comment SET status = 1 WHERE comment_id = #{targetId}
UPDATE member1 SET status = 0 WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memberStatus (num, member_id, status_code, memo, reg_date) VALUES (memberStatus_seq.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, 2, #{memo}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = 'PROCESSED' WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(reg_date) FROM memberStatus WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status_code = 1

SELECT c.comment_id AS "commentId", m.nickname AS "nickname", c.content AS "content", TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "createdAt" FROM post_comment c LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = c.member_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC
SELECT post_id FROM post_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}

SELECT c.comment_id AS "commentId", m.nickname AS "nickname", c.content AS "content", TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "createdAt" FROM freeboard_comment c LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = c.member_id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} AND c.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC
SELECT board_id FROM freeboard_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}

SELECT c.comment_id AS "commentId", m.nickname AS "nickname", c.content AS "content", TO_CHAR(c.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "createdAt" FROM travel_mate_comment c LEFT JOIN member2 m ON m.member_id = c.member_id WHERE c.mate_id = #{mateId} ORDER BY c.comment_id ASC
SELECT mate_id FROM travel_mate_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
